title: Quantum Rei
wikitext:
[]: ¿Quantum Rei?             Quote Post by T. K. Simon » Tue Aug 31, 2021 8:00 am Can the quantum Rei that appears in 3.0 + 1.0 be the same that appears in episode 1 of NGE? We know that it is composed of quarks, they transcend beyond space and time, and given Lilith's divine powers, it is possible. In addition to the fact that in the antiverse, kaworu and Rei know about other cycles or different universes. It's kind of weird ......

[]: Re: ¿Quantum Rei?             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Aug 31, 2021 10:31 am I don't think this is a question that has a definitive answer, but given the things you pointed out, it might very much be possible. Since QR is already implied to defy linear time in her knowledge of events (or rather, in her knowledge of who and which places will become important sooner rather than later) and projections of her are a direct component of TV Instrumentality, I see no reason why she can't have part of the cross-universal properties of instrumentality also. I don't feel strongly about this either way, both them being different entities and them being the same works just fine, or even something in between the two.
